attributes.name: [Oracle WebLogic OTel] High thread pool utilization

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    total_threads = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.threads)),
    idle_threads = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.threads.idle))
  BY attributes.server
| WHERE total_threads > 0
| EVAL utilization_pct = ROUND((total_threads - idle_threads) / total_threads * 100.0, 2)
// Adjust threshold based on expected workload
// 90% indicates limited headroom for handling traffic spikes
| WHERE utilization_pct > 90.0
| SORT utilization_pct DESC
